audienceSections.normal: This chapter teaches [[grammar:was/waren and had/hadden]] and [[grammar:vroeger + past clause]]. Use [[grammar:was]] or [[grammar:waren]] for [[grammar:was]]/were, and [[grammar:had]] or [[grammar:hadden]] for [[grammar:had]]. Use [[grammar:vroeger]] for in the past or formerly.
audienceSections.expert: This chapter introduces [[grammar:was/waren and had/hadden]]: The preterite paradigms of zijn and hebben are suppletive high-frequency forms.; [[grammar:vroeger + past clause]]: [[grammar:Vroeger]] establishes a past reference frame that supports habitual or descriptive preterite clauses.

audienceSections.normal:
#### was/waren and had/hadden

Use [[grammar:was]] or [[grammar:waren]] for [[grammar:was]]/were, and [[grammar:had]] or [[grammar:hadden]] for [[grammar:had]]. Example: [[grammar:De oude klas was klein, maar we hadden veel ruimte.]]

#### vroeger + past clause

Use [[grammar:vroeger]] for in the past or formerly. Example: [[grammar:Vroeger hadden we les in de kamer boven.]]
audienceSections.expert:
#### was/waren and had/hadden

The preterite paradigms of zijn and hebben are suppletive high-frequency forms. Literal example: [[grammar:De oude klas was klein, maar we hadden veel ruimte.]]

#### vroeger + past clause

[[grammar:Vroeger]] establishes a past reference frame that supports habitual or descriptive preterite clauses. Literal example: [[grammar:Vroeger hadden we les in de kamer boven.]]

audienceSections.normal: [[grammar:Was/waren]] and [[grammar:had/hadden]] are irregular past forms. [[grammar:Vroeger]] creates a past frame for descriptions and habits.
audienceSections.expert: [[grammar:Was/waren]] and [[grammar:had/hadden]] are irregular past forms. [[grammar:Vroeger]] creates a past frame for descriptions and habits.

breakdown.normal:
- [[grammar:Dit schoolgebouw ziet er anders uit.]] — This school building looks different.
- [[grammar:Vroeger hadden we les in de kamer boven.]] — In the past we had lessons in the room upstairs.
- [[grammar:De oude klas was klein, maar we hadden veel ruimte.]] — The old classroom was small, but we had plenty of room.
- [[grammar:Was het schoolplein toen ook zo groot?]] — Was the schoolyard this large back then too?
- [[grammar:Nee, vroeger waren er minder fietsen.]] — No, there were fewer bicycles in the past.
- [[grammar:De schoolbel was heel luid.]] — The school bell was very loud.
- [[grammar:En de schoolregels waren streng.]] — And the school rules were strict.
- [[grammar:Toch hadden jullie altijd plezier.]] — Still, you always had fun.
- [[grammar:Ik herken veel gezichten op deze foto.]] — I recognize many faces in this photo.
- [[grammar:Er stonden toen driehonderdvijftig leerlingen op school.]] — There were three hundred fifty pupils at the school then.
- [[grammar:De oude bibliotheek is nu verdwenen.]] — The old library is gone now.
- [[grammar:Dat is een bijzondere herinnering.]] — That is a special memory.
- [[grammar:Was er vroeger elk jaar een reünie?]] — Was there a reunion every year in the past?
- [[grammar:Nee, we hadden maar eens in de vijf jaar een reünie.]] — No, we had a reunion only once every five years.
- [[grammar:Vandaag zijn er veel oud-leerlingen.]] — There are many former pupils here today.
- [[grammar:Ik herken nog bijna iedereen.]] — I still recognize almost everyone.
- [[grammar:Vroeger was alles kleiner, maar de herinneringen zijn groot.]] — Everything was smaller in the past, but the memories are large.
- [[grammar:We maken nog een foto op het schoolplein.]] — We will take one more photo in the schoolyard.
